spec.name: The Great Eastern Desert
spec.description: A vast desert stretches for miles, the sands constantly shifting around you. A pyramid lies to the south-west and a deep canyon to the east. Just below you can make out a tiny ledge.

north.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

south.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

west.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.
